description:
Modern SSH client built in Rust — terminal, SFTP, and host management.

Modern SSH client built in Rust — terminal, SFTP, and host management.
What's Changed
Added
- feat: PuTTY .ppk import (v2 and v3, RSA / Ed25519 / ECDSA P-256 / ECDSA P-384, encrypted or not), verified byte-exact against fixtures from real puttygen output
- feat: encrypted PKCS#8 import (BEGIN ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY, RFC 5958 PBES2)
- feat: Ed25519 in PKCS#8 (OID 1.3.101.112, RFC 8410)
Fixed
- fix: DSA and ECDSA P-521 no longer silently mislabel as Ed25519 / P-256; they return an actionable error instead
- fix: legacy OpenSSL-encrypted PEM (Proc-Type:4,ENCRYPTED) now surfaces a dedicated message pointing users at the new .ppk path or ssh-keygen -p
i18n
- Two new keys (key_encrypted_legacy_pem, key_unsupported_kind) translated across all 11 languages
Full Changelog: v0.6.0...v0.6.1
Full Changelog: v0.6.0...v0.6.1
